report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: DAO Governance Security (attack vectors, real exploits, defense mechanisms) and Funding Rate Arbitrage (delta-neutral perp strategies). Both pages include full SEO metadata, JSON-LD structured data with FAQ schemas, and are queued for publishing.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Governance attacks: Compiled 8+ real incidents (Beanstalk $181M, Tornado Cash, Compound GoldenBoyz, UPCX $70M, Arbitrum vote buying). $780M+ lost to governance attacks in 2025. 12,000+ DAOs managing $28B. Only 17% average voter participation.

Funding rate arbitrage: Documented 3 core strategies (cash-and-carry, cross-exchange, delta-neutral). Current APY 2-6% (compressed market). Covered CEX vs DEX mechanics (8hr vs 1hr funding). Identified CoinGlass, Loris Tools, Hummingbot as key tools.
Content gap analysis: Site has 228 learn topics and 112 tools. Both selected topics represent genuine gaps with no existing dedicated coverage.

sections.title: Content Created
items: governance-security-attack-vectors-2026: ~310 lines TSX. Covers 5 attack vectors (flashloan, vote buying, delegate concentration, time-lock bypass, malicious injection), 5 case studies with dollar amounts, 6 defense mechanisms, governance security checklist (3 tiers), futarchy section, 5 FAQs.

funding-rate-arbitrage-guide-2026: ~380 lines TSX. Covers funding rate mechanics, 3 core strategies with APY ranges, step-by-step cash-and-carry walkthrough, returns table by market condition, 5 risk categories, CEX vs DEX comparison (5 venues), essential tools section, 5 FAQs.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: governance-security: Title 'DAO Governance Security 2026: Attack Vectors, Exploits & Defenses | degen0x'. Target keywords: DAO governance attacks, flashloan governance attack, governance security. Article + FAQPage JSON-LD schemas (5 FAQs). OG + Twitter cards configured.

funding-rate-arbitrage: Title 'Funding Rate Arbitrage Guide 2026: Delta-Neutral Perp Strategies | degen0x'. Target keywords: funding rate arbitrage, delta neutral strategy, perp arbitrage. Article + FAQPage JSON-LD schemas (5 FAQs). OG + Twitter cards configured.
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts. Layout.tsx files created with Metadata exports and inline JSON-LD structured data.
